alignments.candidate_evidence: 8 years at Google Devices & Services with two promotions, scaling global commercial operations and leading transformation programs; executive-level stakeholder engagement experience
alignments.job_requirement: Lead executive-level workshops to identify business challenges and opportunities where Mistral's AI can drive step-change improvements

alignments.candidate_evidence: Transformation program leadership with ownership of requirements, logic design, UAT, rollout, and production deployment at scale; demonstrated ability to bridge strategy and execution
alignments.job_requirement: Architect end-to-end AI solutions, integrating Mistral's models and platform into customer workflows and technical infrastructure; Partner with Applied AI team to design, prototype, and deploy AI solutions in production

alignments.candidate_evidence: Cross-functional collaboration driving commercial operations and transformation; experience translating customer/market needs into product and operational change
alignments.job_requirement: Act as the bridge between customers and Mistral's internal teams, synthesizing feedback to influence product and research roadmaps

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led global commercial operations scaling and multi-year transformation initiatives at Google; strategic program leadership demonstrates structured problem-solving at enterprise scale
alignments.job_requirement: Strong business acumen and problem-solving skills, with the ability to structure ambiguous challenges into actionable solutions

alignments.candidate_evidence: 8 years in strategy and operations roles with cross-functional and internal stakeholder engagement; product operations and transformation experience exceeds minimum tenure requirement
alignments.job_requirement: 2+ years in a client-facing strategic and technical role (e.g., data science consulting, value engineering, or technical sales)

alignments.candidate_evidence: Two promotions and seniority ceiling placement at Manager/Senior Manager/Lead/Principal level indicate executive credibility and senior stakeholder influence capability
alignments.job_requirement: Executive presence and communication skills to influence senior stakeholders (VP, C-level)

gaps.gap: Hands-on experience building and deploying AI applications (Python, JavaScript) stated twice in JD; candidate has basic Python and is actively learning, not demonstrated production deployment
gaps.mitigation: On-the-job learning during onboarding with Applied AI team; leverage transformation and deployment ownership background to accelerate technical credibility in AI context

gaps.gap: Degree in relevant scientific field (Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, etc.) is stated as requirement; candidate background not specified in profile
gaps.mitigation: Verify degree credentials during screening; 8 years of relevant strategic/operations experience may satisfy intent if candidature is otherwise strong

gaps.gap: Client-facing consulting or value-engineering brand experience; candidate's client interaction is primarily internal Google stakeholder and partnership-driven
gaps.mitigation: Reframe internal stakeholder influence, transformation delivery, and roadmap impact as equivalent value-engineering rigor; external client reference calls during diligence

gaps.gap: Sales qualification frameworks (MEDDPICC, value-based selling) are marked 'a plus' but not tested in role; candidate background emphasizes operations and transformation, not sales methodology
gaps.mitigation: Framework training during onboarding; less critical given 'plus' language and emphasis on strategic/technical delivery over quota-driven sales

output.level_rationale: Role requires 2+ years client-facing strategic and technical work; JD emphasizes executive-level engagement, solution architecture, and production deployment ownership. Reporting line and company stage are unstated, limiting confidence. Title "Strategist" at early-stage AI vendor suggests L4-L5 IC scope rather than manager track.
output.summary: Strong fit on strategy, transformation, executive engagement, and cross-functional program delivery; candidate's 8-year Google tenure in strategy and operations directly maps to role's vision-setting and production-deployment leadership. Primary gaps are hands-on AI/Python deployment (actively learning, high severity) and external consulting brand (medium severity). Degree requirement unverified. Role is estimated L4, within candidate's target band; company stage and reporting line unstated, lowering overall confidence.
uncertainties: Candidate's educational credentials (degree field) not stated in profile; JD states degree in relevant scientific field as requirement
Company stage and headcount not stated; affects level confidence and seniority assessment
Depth of candidate's AI/ML domain knowledge unstated; role requires foundational AI/ML credibility with mixed audiences
Reporting line and manager title not stated in JD; affects L4 vs. L5 distinction
